english: modal particle indicating suggestion or urging

etymology.description: semantic 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") + phonetic 巴(巴) (bā) -> modal particle indicating suggestion or urging
etymology.interpretation: The character 吧(吧) (ba, "modal particle") combines 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth"), emphasizing speech or oral communication, with phonetic 巴(巴) (bā), to form a particle used in spoken language to suggest, urge, or give a mild command. The phonetic 巴 supplies the sound, while 口 ties the concept to oral communication.

examples.chinese: 我们去看电影吧(我們去看電影吧)。
早点休息吧(早點休息吧)！
把门关上吧(把門關上吧)。
